keywords.name: Bodyguard
keywords.text: (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

keywords.name: Support
keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

keywords.name: Boost 2 {Ink}
keywords.text: (Once during your turn, you may pay 2 {Ink} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)

abilities.name: Top That!
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, if there's a card under him, chosen opposing character can't challenge and must quest if able during their next turn.

keywords.name: Support
keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

abilities.name: Act of Kindness
abilities.text: Whenever one of your characters is chosen for Support, until the start of your next turn, the next time they would be dealt damage they take no damage instead.

data.name: Headless Manhorse
data.flavor_text:
Manny was looking to get ahead, but he'd never
considered that something in the Inkwell Caverns
was looking for him.

data.name: Higgins
data.flavor_text:
"The paper trail led me to this bench, in this park.
I'll have to keep an eye peeled for my quarry. The
Littering Loiterer won't give me the slip this time!"

data.name: Rajah

keywords.name: Bodyguard
keywords.text: (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

data.flavor_text:
He's determined to protect his friends, no matter
what forms they take.

data.name: Eilonwy

keywords.name: Support
keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

data.flavor_text: "If you want to come with me, you may."

data.name: Scrooge McDuck

abilities.name: Fabulous Wealth
abilities.text: When you play this character, chosen character with a card under them gets +1 {Lore} this turn.

data.flavor_text: "Curse me kilts, have I missed trouble!"

data.name: Webby Vanderquack

abilities.name: I've Read About This
abilities.text: While you have a character or location in play with a card under them, this character gets +1 {Lore}.

data.flavor_text:
"If I'm correct, and I know I am, these are the
plants from chapter 6 of Hana's Herborium."

data.name: Gurgi

abilities.name: Happy Day
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may remove up to 2 damage from chosen character.

data.flavor_text:
In its reflection he could see the future: Moments
from now, they'd be less hungry.

data.name: Mrs. Beakley

keywords.name: Bodyguard
keywords.text: (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

data.flavor_text:
Initiator of the STOP protocol: Strategic
Termination of Progression.

data.name: Bagheera
data.flavor_text:
He had seen many strange things in the
Mysterious Ruins, but the glowing river was the
most concerning. It looked and moved like water
but somehow felt...different.

data.name: Shanti

keywords.name: Singer 5
keywords.text: (This character counts as cost 5 to sing songs.)

data.flavor_text:
Her song winds through the forest, the gentle
melody soothing the hearts of all who hear it.

abilities.name: Hold...your Horses
abilities.text: This character enters play exerted.

abilities.name: Deep Research
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you may give chosen Detective character +2 {Strength} this turn.

keywords.name: Support
keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

abilities.name: Follow the Pig
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you may return a character card named Hen Wen from your discard to your hand.

data.name: Sebastian
data.flavor_text:
"A fine mess you've gotten yourself into this time,
Sebastian. If the Sea King finds out something's
wrong with Ariel before we find a way to fix it, you
really will be in hot water!"

keywords.name: Boost 1 {Ink}
keywords.text: (Once during your turn, you may pay 1 {Ink} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)

abilities.name: Command Performance
abilities.text: Once during your turn, whenever you play a song, if there's a card under this character, you may draw a card.

keywords.name: Shift 4 {Ink}
keywords.text: (You may pay 4 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Scrooge McDuck.)

abilities.name: Speculation
abilities.text: Whenever you play a character or location with Boost, you may put the top card of your deck facedown under them.

data.name: Mowgli

abilities.name: Have a Better Look
abilities.text: When you play this character, chosen opponent reveals their hand and discards a non-character card of their choice.

data.flavor_text: "This place is just a different kind of jungle."

keywords.name: Boost 3 {Ink}
keywords.text: (Once during your turn, you may pay 3 {Ink} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)

abilities.name: Timely Alliance
abilities.text: Whenever you put a card under this character, you may reveal the top card of your deck. If it's a character card, you may play that character for free and they enter play exerted. Otherwise, put it on the bottom of your deck.

data.name: Goofy

abilities.name: Perfect Trap
abilities.text: When you play this character, chosen opposing character gets -1 {Strength} until the start of your next turn.

data.flavor_text:
"If you wanna beat a ghost, you gotta think like
a ghost."

data.name: Della Duck

abilities.name: Here to Help
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may ready chosen character with Boost. If you do, they can't quest or challenge for the rest of this turn.

data.flavor_text:
"I promise I'm coming home, somehow. Nothing
can stop Della Duck!"

abilities.name: Leading the Way
abilities.text: Your other Amber characters get +2 {Willpower}.

abilities.name: Friendly Chorus
abilities.text: While you have 2 or more other Amber characters in play, this character gains Singer 8. (They count as cost 8 to sing songs.)

keywords.name: Shift 5 {Ink}
keywords.text: (You may pay 5 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Goofy.)

abilities.name: Hot Pursuit
abilities.text: When you play this character and whenever he quests, each opposing character gets -1 {Strength} until the start of your next turn.

keywords.name: Singer 7
keywords.text: (This character counts as cost 7 to sing songs.)

abilities.name: Crowd Favorite
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may put a song card from your discard on the top of your deck.

data.name: Search for Clues
rules: The player or players with the most cards in their hands choose and discard 2 cards. If you have a Detective character in play, gain 1 lore.
data.flavor_text:
Judy: "Wait, are these lorebook pages?"
Nick: "Looks like it, Carrots. Maybe that's where the
whispers come from!"

data.name: Or Rewrite History!
rules: (A character with cost 3 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Return a character card from your discard to your hand.
data.flavor_text:
Every day they're out there making
DuckTales! Woo-oo!

data.name: Della's Moon Lullaby
rules: (A character with cost 2 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Chosen opposing character gets -2 {Strength} until the start of your next turn. Draw a card.
data.flavor_text: Life is strange and vast

data.name: The Horseman Strikes!
rules: Draw a card. You may banish chosen character with Evasive.
data.flavor_text: Just when you thought you'd escaped...

abilities.name: What Is to Come
abilities.text: When you play this item, look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal a character card and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

abilities.name: Whispered Power
abilities.text: {Exert} — Put the top card of your deck facedown under one of your characters or locations with Boost.

data.name: Webby's Diary

abilities.name: Latest Entry
abilities.text: Whenever you put a card under one of your characters or locations, you may pay 1 {Ink} to draw a card.

data.flavor_text:
"A girl needs a place to put her innermost thoughts and
feelings—not to mention trap designs!"
—Webby

abilities.name: The Cauldron Calls
abilities.text: {Exert} — Put a character card from your discard under this item faceup.

abilities.name: Rise and Join Me!
abilities.text: {Exert} — This turn, you may play characters from under this item.

abilities.name: What a Juicy Apple
abilities.text: {Exert} — Remove up to 2 damage from chosen character.

abilities.name: Come on Out
abilities.text: You pay 1 {Ink} less to play characters named Gurgi.

abilities.name: Where Fun Is in the Zone
abilities.text: Whenever a character quests while here, you pay 2 {Ink} less for the next character you play this turn.

abilities.name: Mystical Balance
abilities.text: Whenever one of your other Amethyst characters is banished in a challenge, you may draw a card.

keywords.name: Shift 2 {Ink}
keywords.text: (You may pay 2 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named The Horned King.)

abilities.name: Arise!
abilities.text: Whenever one of your other characters is banished in a challenge, you may return that card to your hand, then choose and discard a card.

keywords.name: Evasive
keywords.text: (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

abilities.name: Swooping Strike
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, each opponent chooses and exerts one of their ready characters.

data.name: The Horned King
data.flavor_text:
"Untried courage is no match for his evil."
—Dallben

data.name: Cauldron Born
data.flavor_text:
"My beloved warriors have come to life! All the
dead of centuries past! Never has anyone created
an army like this!"
—The Horned King

keywords.name: Challenger +2
keywords.text: (While challenging, this character gets +2 {Strength}.)

abilities.name: Stone by Day
abilities.text: If you have 3 or more cards in your hand, this character can't ready.

data.name: Magica De Spell

abilities.name: Dark Incantation
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may shuffle a card from chosen player's discard into their deck.

data.flavor_text:
"My power is still not enough. I need something
more. Something... shadowy."

data.name: Lena Sabrewing

abilities.name: Arcane Connection
abilities.text: When you play this character, if you have a character or location in play with a card under them, gain 1 lore.

data.flavor_text:
"This is a strange kind of magic. These ‘whispers’
seem independent, but they're still incomplete."

data.name: Iago

keywords.name: Challenger +5
keywords.text: (While challenging, this character gets +5 {Strength}.)

data.flavor_text: "That does it—now I'm really ticked off!"

data.name: Violet Sabrewing

keywords.name: Evasive
keywords.text: (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

data.flavor_text:
"At last, an opportunity to earn my Mysterious
Ruins Exploration badge!"

data.name: Elsa

abilities.name: Closer Look
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may draw a card.

data.flavor_text: "This world still has secrets to uncover."

data.name: Mushu
data.flavor_text:
"I'm the scariest thing in this forest. That pumpkin
head should be scared of me!"

keywords.name: Rush
keywords.text: (This character can challenge the turn they're played.)

abilities.name: Final Act
abilities.text: During your turn, when this character is banished, you may put the top card of your deck facedown under one of your characters or locations with Boost.

data.name: Nibs

abilities.name: Look Who's Back
abilities.text: When this character is banished in a challenge, return this card to your hand.

data.flavor_text: "That was fun! Let's do it again!"

data.name: The Horned King

abilities.name: Grand Machinations
abilities.text: During your turn, if 1 or more cards have left a player's discard this turn, this character gets +2 {Lore}.

data.flavor_text: "Only moments away from victory."

data.name: Creeper
data.flavor_text:
"Yes! Things are going exactly as sire planned.
Soon the cauldron will be ours—I mean his."

data.name: Coldstone

abilities.name: The Cantrips Have Been Spoken
abilities.text: When you play this character, if you have 2 or more Gargoyle character cards in your discard, gain 2 lore.

data.flavor_text:
"It's alive! Alive! I've always wanted to say that."
—Xanatos

data.name: Magica De Spell

abilities.name: Mystical Manipulation
abilities.text: Whenever you put a card under one of your characters or locations, you may move 1 damage counter from chosen character to chosen opposing character.

data.flavor_text:
"I am the stuff of nightmares lurking in the hidden
recesses of your mind!"

abilities.name: Helpful Instincts
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may choose and discard a card to return chosen character with cost 2 or less to their player's hand.

keywords.name: Shift 7 {Ink}
keywords.text: (You may pay 7 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Magica De Spell.)

abilities.name: Shadow's Grasp
abilities.text: When you play this character, if you used Shift to play her, you may draw 4 cards.

abilities.name: Ad Saxum Commutate
abilities.text: When you play this character, exert all opposing characters. Then, each player with fewer than 3 cards in their hand draws until they have 3.

abilities.name: Stone by Day
abilities.text: If you have 3 or more cards in your hand, this character can't ready.

data.name: Hades

abilities.name: What D'ya Say?
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may choose an opposing character. If you do, draw 2 cards unless that character's player puts that card on the bottom of their deck.

data.flavor_text: "I'm kind of on a schedule here—I got plans for August."

data.name: Olaf

abilities.name: Second Chance
abilities.text: When this character leaves play, you may return chosen character of yours to your hand.

data.flavor_text:
"Here, hold this while I get help. Try not to go
anywhere."

keywords.name: Boost 2 {Ink}
keywords.text: (Once during your turn, you may pay 2 {Ink} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)

abilities.name: Legacy of Learning
abilities.text: When this character is banished in a challenge, if he had a card under him, draw 2 cards.

keywords.text: (Once during your turn, you may pay 1 {Ink} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)

abilities.text: While there's a card under this character, she gets +1 {Lore} and gains Evasive. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)

keywords.name: Boost 2 {Ink}
keywords.text: (Once during your turn, you may pay 2 {Ink} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)

abilities.name: It's Loads of Fun
abilities.text: Whenever you put a card under this character, you may move up to 2 damage counters from chosen character to chosen opposing character.

data.name: Begone!
rules: Return chosen character, item, or location with cost 3 or less to their player's hand.
data.flavor_text: "Alakazam, alakazook, send this page back to its book!"

data.name: Can't Hold It Back Anymore
rules: (A character with cost 4 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Exert chosen opposing character. Move all damage counters from all other characters to that character.

data.name: Swooping Strike
rules: Each opponent chooses and exerts one of their ready characters.
data.flavor_text: You could try to run...

data.name: Performance Review
rules: {Exert} chosen ready character of yours to draw cards equal to that character's {Lore}.
data.flavor_text:
"Listen, fellas, it's a real ‘what have you done for me
lately’ business. So give me something to work with
here!"

data.name: Fragile as a Flower
rules: (A character with cost 3 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Draw a card. Exert chosen character with cost 2 or less. They can't ready at the start of their next turn.

data.name: Junior Woodchuck Guidebook

abilities.name: The Book Knows Everything
abilities.text: {Exert} — Draw 2 cards.

data.flavor_text:
"How come ghosts get a whole section, but not
were-ducks?!"
—Huey

abilities.name: Doctrina Adducere
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever an opposing character becomes exerted, gain 1 lore.

abilities.name: Celeritas
abilities.text: Your characters named Demona gain Rush. (They can challenge the turn they're played.)

data.name: The Great Illuminary

abilities.name: Startling Discovery
abilities.text: Characters gain "{Exert} — Draw a card" while here.

data.flavor_text:
"Remember, we're looking for clues to who tore up the lorebook pages."
—Elisa Maza

data.name: Baloo
data.flavor_text:
"I tell ya, for a spooky forest, this place is all right.
Plenty of berries, lots of trees for back-scratching...
A bear could do a lot worse."

data.name: Big Nose
data.flavor_text:
"Thou art pretty as a brawl
Thy hair's as dark as a moonless night
Thy cheeks the red of leaves in fall—
I love to sit and watch you fight"

data.name: Flotsam

keywords.name: Evasive
keywords.text: (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

data.flavor_text: "You're in our world now."

data.name: Kaa

keywords.name: Ward
keywords.text: (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)

data.flavor_text: "It's bessst to play it s-ssafe."

data.name: Webby Vanderquack

abilities.name: Contagious Energy
abilities.text: When you play this character, chosen character gets +1 {Strength} this turn.

data.flavor_text:
"It's happening! IT'S HAPPENING! There's a
whisper nearby, and I get to see it!"

abilities.name: You Better Run
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may pay 2 {Ink} to return chosen opposing character with 2 {Strength} or less to their player's hand.

data.name: Vladimir

abilities.name: High Standards
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you may banish chosen item.

data.flavor_text:
His commitment to excellent craftsmanship is
unparalleled.

data.name: Flintheart Glomgold

abilities.name: Try Me
abilities.text: While you have a character or location in play with a card under them, this character gains Ward. (Opponents can't choose them except to challenge.)

data.flavor_text: "Long live Glomgold! Glomgold! Glomgold!"

data.name: Jetsam

abilities.name: Ambush from the Deep
abilities.text: When you play this character, deal 3 damage to chosen opposing damaged character.

data.flavor_text: "You're coming with us."

data.name: Hook Hand
data.flavor_text:
"You're a strange lookin' glimmer, ain'tcha?" he
said to the whisper lingering uncertainly in the
doorway. "Welcome to the Snuggly Duckling!"

data.name: Kaa

keywords.name: Evasive
keywords.text: (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

data.flavor_text:
It's hard to tell where the branches end and the
snake begins.

data.name: Emily Quackfaster

abilities.name: Recommended Reading
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may put the top card of your deck facedown under one of your characters or locations with Boost.

data.flavor_text:
"Hana's Herborium? The book that Illumineer wrote?
Our only copy has been checked out, sadly."

keywords.name: Boost 2 {Ink}
keywords.text: (Once during your turn, you may pay 2 {Ink} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)

abilities.name: I'll Take That
abilities.text: While there's a card under this character, he gets +2 {Strength} and +1 {Lore}.

data.name: Bellwether

abilities.name: Vendetta
abilities.text: When this character is challenged and banished, put 1 damage counter on each opposing character.

data.flavor_text: "I will have sweet revenge!"

data.name: Launchpad

abilities.name: Off the Map
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may banish chosen location.

data.flavor_text: "You can't spell ‘crash-landed’ without ‘landed’!"

data.name: Penumbra
data.flavor_text:
"You will treat the vastly superior Moon
with respect, or you will suffer the ultimate
consequence."

keywords.name: Shift 3 {Ink}
keywords.text: (You may pay 3 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Baloo.)

abilities.text: When you play this character, draw a card, then choose and discard a card.

abilities.text: When this character is challenged, return this card to your hand. (No damage is dealt in that challenge.)

data.name: Akela

abilities.name: Ahead of the Pack
abilities.text: {Exert} — This character gets +1 {Strength} this turn.

data.flavor_text:
"Follow me, if you can," Akela said, bounding into
the Bitterwood. "The hunt is on!"

abilities.text: Whenever one of your other Emerald characters is challenged and banished, banish the challenging character.

data.name: So Be It!
rules: Each of your characters gets +1 {Strength} this turn. You may banish chosen item.
data.flavor_text: He's a patient merman—up to a point.

data.name: Trust In Me
rules: (A character with cost 6 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)

Choose one:
• Each opposing character gets -1 {Lore} until the start of
your next turn.
• Each opponent chooses and discards 2 cards.

data.name: Chomp!
rules: Deal 2 damage to chosen damaged character.
data.flavor_text:
Mickey: "What IS that thing?!"
Goofy: "It's hungry, that's what!"

data.name: Malicious, Mean, and Scary
rules: (A character with cost 3 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Put 1 damage counter on each opposing character.
data.flavor_text: My sneer could curdle dairy

abilities.text: {Exert} — Put 1 damage counter on chosen character.

data.name: Inscrutable Map

abilities.name: Backtrack
abilities.text: {Exert} — Chosen opposing character gets -1 {Lore} until the start of your next turn.

data.flavor_text:
Nick: "What kind of nonsense is this?"
Judy: "These symbols must mean something..."

data.name: Enigmatic Inkcaster

abilities.name: Its Own Reward
abilities.text: {Exert} — If you've played 2 or more cards this turn, gain 1 lore.

data.flavor_text:
"Whoever's room this was, I think we just found their
inkcaster."
—Shanzay, an Illumineer

abilities.text: When you play this item, you may put the top card of your deck facedown under one of your characters or locations with Boost.

abilities.text: Whenever one of your characters or locations with a card under them is challenged, gain 1 lore.

data.name: Diablo
data.flavor_text:
"Be careful when gathering herbs in the Inkwell
Caverns. You never know who's watching."
—Hana's Herborium

keywords.name: Reckless
keywords.text: (This character can't quest and must challenge each turn if able.)

abilities.name: Call to Battle
abilities.text: Once during your turn, whenever you put a card under one of your characters or locations, you may ready chosen character. If you do, that character can't quest for the rest of this turn.

data.name: Peter Pan

keywords.name: Evasive
keywords.text: (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

data.flavor_text:
"Wanna race? Last one through the Inkwell
Caverns is a codfish!"

data.name: Tinker Bell
data.flavor_text:
"Okay, now we know pixie dust doesn't affect the
torn lorebook pages. Thanks, Tink."
—Venturo, an Illumineer

data.name: Raksha

abilities.name: On Patrol
abilities.text: {Exert} — Once during your turn, you may pay 1 {Ink} less to move this character to a location.

data.flavor_text:
Her name means "protection," and she'll do
anything to defend the cubs under her care.

data.name: Shere Khan
data.flavor_text:
"Jungle or forest, it doesn't matter. I'd recognize
the scent of man anywhere."

data.name: Rama

abilities.name: Protection of the Pack
abilities.text: Whenever you play another character with 5 {Strength} or more, you may ready this character. If you do, he can't quest for the rest of this turn.

data.flavor_text:
With cubs to protect, any strange sound must be
investigated.

data.name: Mother Gothel

abilities.name: Somebody's Got to Use It
abilities.text: If a character was banished this turn, this character gets +2 {Strength}.

data.flavor_text:
"The world is a cruel place, and sometimes you've
got to be a little cruel to get by."

data.name: Katrina Van Tassel
data.flavor_text:
She danced the night away, hoping to find
someone who could keep up with her.

data.name: Hermes

keywords.name: Rush
keywords.text: (This character can challenge the turn they're played.)

data.flavor_text:
"What do you mean, ‘late’? Kid, I was ahead of my
time before time was invented."

abilities.name: What Are You Waiting For?
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, chosen character gains Rush this turn. (They can challenge the turn they're played.)

abilities.name: Jostling For Power
abilities.text: King and Queen characters can't quest.

abilities.name: Growing Influence
abilities.text: At the start of your turn, if an opponent has 2 or more ready characters in play, gain 2 lore.

abilities.name: Ever Vigilant
abilities.text: This character can't be dealt damage unless he's being challenged.

abilities.name: Ever Valiant
abilities.text: While this character is exerted, your other Hero characters can't be dealt damage unless they're being challenged.

abilities.name: Be Careful, All of You
abilities.text: Whenever one of your Gargoyle characters challenges another character, gain 1 lore.

abilities.name: Stone by Day
abilities.text: If you have 3 or more cards in your hand, this character can't ready.

data.name: Brooklyn

keywords.name: Evasive
keywords.text: (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

abilities.name: Stone by Day
abilities.text: If you have 3 or more cards in your hand, this character can't ready.

data.flavor_text: "If they think we're beasts and monsters..."

abilities.name: High Energy
abilities.text: Your other Ruby characters get +1 {Strength}.

abilities.name: Powerful Reward
abilities.text: Your other Ruby characters with 7 {Strength} or more get +1 {Lore}.

data.name: Elisa Maza

abilities.name: Special Detail
abilities.text: While you have 2 or more other characters in play with 5 {Strength} or more, this character gets +2 {Lore}.

data.flavor_text:
"Now, you can let me look the place over, or I can
come back with a warrant and a lot more cops.
Your call."

keywords.name: Boost 1 {Ink}
keywords.text: (Once during your turn, you may pay 1 {Ink} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)

keywords.name: Reckless
keywords.text: (This character can't quest and must challenge each turn if able.)

abilities.name: Only the Bold
abilities.text: While there's a card under this character, your characters with Reckless gain "{Exert} — Gain 1 lore."

keywords.name: Boost 2 {Ink}
keywords.text: (Once during your turn, you may pay 2 {Ink} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)

abilities.name: Expedient Schemes
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, if you've put a card under her this turn, you may play an action with cost 5 or less from your discard for free, then put that action card on the bottom of your deck instead of into your discard.

abilities.name: Leaves No Trace
abilities.text: When you play this character, banish chosen opposing character with 2 {Strength} or less.

abilities.name: Gathering Strength
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever an opposing character is banished, each of your characters gets +1 {Strength} this turn.

abilities.name: Flowing Blade
abilities.text: During your turn, if you've put a card under one of your characters or locations this turn, this character takes no damage from challenges.

data.name: Brom Bones

abilities.name: Rough and Tumble
abilities.text: Whenever this character challenges a character with 2 {Strength} or less, each opponent loses 1 lore.

data.flavor_text:
"Hold on, schoolmaster! That's a mighty big book.
Let me take that for you!"

keywords.name: Shift 5 {Ink}
keywords.text: (You may pay 5 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Shere Khan.)

abilities.name: Wild Rage
abilities.text: {Exert} — Ready this character. He can't quest for the rest of this turn.

data.name: Next Stop, Olympus
rules: Ready chosen character. They can't quest for the rest of this turn. The next time they challenge another character this turn, gain 1 lore.
If you have a character with 5 {Strength} or more in play, you pay 2 {Ink} less to play this action.

data.name: Get to Safety!
rules: Play a location with cost 3 or less from your discard for free. Then, if you have a location named Sleepy Hollow in play, draw a card.
data.flavor_text: Run scared if you must—but whatever you do, RUN!

data.name: Time to Go!
rules: Banish chosen character of yours to draw 2 cards. If that character had a card under them, draw 3 cards instead.
data.flavor_text:
"What are you doing here when there's a rogue
horseman out there? Have you lost your head?"
—Gaston

data.name: Ghostly Tale
rules: Exert all opposing characters with 2 {Strength} or less.
data.flavor_text:
Brom dwelled on every frightful detail, determined to
put a good scare into his rival.

data.name: Dragon Fire
rules: Banish chosen character.
data.flavor_text: Never underestimate the wrath of a dragon.

abilities.name: I Need Firepower
abilities.text: When you play this item, chosen character gains Rush this turn. (They can challenge the turn they're played.)

abilities.name: Hitch a Ride
abilities.text: {Exert} — Chosen character gains Rush this turn.

abilities.name: Gather Resources
abilities.text: Once during your turn, whenever you move a character with 5 {Strength} or more here, you may draw a card.

abilities.name: Head For the Bridge!
abilities.text: Whenever a character quests while here, you may banish this location to gain 2 lore and give them Evasive until the start of your next turn. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)

data.name: Judy Hopps

abilities.name: Hidden Clues
abilities.text: When you play this character, if you have another Detective character in play, you may put chosen item into its player's inkwell facedown and exerted.

data.flavor_text: "More torn lorebook pages! Who could have done this?"

data.name: Hen Wen

abilities.name: Future Sight
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, look at the top card of your deck. Put it on either the top or the bottom of your deck.

data.flavor_text:
"She's a special pig, Taran."
—Dallben

data.name: Anna

keywords.name: Support
keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

data.flavor_text:
"Come on—there's tons to do! Skating and snow
forts and sledding and hot chocolate!"

data.name: Chef Louis
data.flavor_text:
"When added to a clear soup, the pale, triple-
pointed leaves of Trispiritus can have a restorative
effect. CAUTION: DO NOT confuse it with Three
Thorns, which causes itchy rashes."
—Hana's Herborium

data.name: Daisy Duck

keywords.name: Support
keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

data.flavor_text:
"If I'm reading this right, these aren't actually ghosts
at all! Boy, you're lucky I came along on this one."

data.name: Cri-Kee

keywords.name: Alert
keywords.text: (This character can challenge as if they had Evasive.)

data.flavor_text:
"Small glimmers may feel safe in the jungle
around the Mysterious Ruins, where they can
easily go unnoticed."
—Hana's Herborium

data.name: Rapunzel

abilities.name: Ensnarl
abilities.text: When you play this character, chosen opposing character gets -3 {Strength} this turn.

data.flavor_text: "Well, that should slow you down for a minute."

data.name: Fergus McDuck

abilities.name: Toughen Up
abilities.text: When you play this character, chosen character of yours gains Ward until the start of your next turn. (Opponents can't choose them except to challenge.)

data.flavor_text:
"Ach, close the secret entrance! You're letting all
the mysterious air out!"

data.name: Li Shang
data.flavor_text:
The sound of hoofbeats filled the air. Li Shang
moved his men into position, ready to turn the
tables on their pursuer.

data.name: Genie
data.flavor_text:
"You know, most books are a lot more compelling
when you read the pages in order..."

data.name: Scuttle

keywords.name: Ward
keywords.text: (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)

data.flavor_text: "Whoa! The wind's all of a sudden on the move here."

abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, if you've played a character with cost 5 or more this turn, put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

abilities.name: Uplifting Aura
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, if there's a card under her, remove up to 3 damage from each of your characters.

keywords.name: Shift 4 {Ink}
keywords.text: (You may pay 4 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Judy Hopps.)

abilities.name: Lateral Thinking
abilities.text: During your turn, your Detective characters gain Alert and Resist +2. (They can challenge as if they had Evasive. Damage dealt to them is reduced by 2.)

data.name: The Sultan
data.flavor_text:
Never mind what the Curator intended these
trinkets for; the sultan found his own use for them
soon enough.

data.name: Ichabod Crane

abilities.name: Chilling Tale
abilities.text: When this character is banished, you may put this card into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

data.flavor_text:
"Every small detail in Brom's awful story returned
to haunt his recollection."
—Narrator

keywords.text: (Once during your turn, you may pay 2 {Ink} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)

keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

abilities.name: Strange Happenings
abilities.text: While this character is exerted, cards enter opponents' inkwells exerted.

abilities.name: Whatever You Wish For
abilities.text: At the end of your turn, if you played a Princess character this turn, you may put a card from your hand into your inkwell facedown to draw a card.

abilities.name: Thorough Investigation
abilities.text: When you play this character and whenever she quests, look at the top 3 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Detective character card and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

data.name: Pluto

abilities.name: On the Trail
abilities.text: {Exert} — If you have a Detective character in play, return an item card from your discard to your hand. Otherwise, put it on the top of your deck.

data.flavor_text: Every detective can use an assistant to sniff out clues.

abilities.name: Stand Fast
abilities.text: Your other Sapphire characters gain Resist +1. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

abilities.name: Look Ahead
abilities.text: Whenever one of your other Sapphire characters quests, you may look at the top card of your deck. Put it on either the top or the bottom of your deck.

keywords.name: Boost 1 {Ink}
keywords.text: (Once during your turn, you may pay 1 {Ink} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)

data.name: Mickey Mouse

abilities.name: Get a Clue
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

data.flavor_text:
The clues all pointed toward ghosts, but he knew
there was something more going on here.

data.name: Hen Wen's Visions
rules: Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. Put 1 on the top of your deck and the rest on the bottom in any order.
data.flavor_text:
"Hen Wen, from you I do beseech
Knowledge that lies beyond my reach..."
—Taran

data.name: Promising Lead
rules: Chosen character gets +1 {Lore} and gains Support this turn. (Whenever they quest, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)
data.flavor_text:
"The books on these pages match up with those shelves. And the
ley lines...The answer's right here!"
—Judy Hopps

data.name: Might Solve a Mystery
rules: (A character with cost 4 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal up to 1 character card and up to 1 item card and put them into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

data.name: Sudden Scare
rules: Put chosen opposing character into their player's inkwell facedown. That player puts the top card of their deck into their inkwell facedown.

data.name: Spooky Sight
rules: Put all characters with cost 3 or less into their players' inkwells facedown and exerted.
data.flavor_text:
"We've got to get out of here!"
—Mickey Mouse

data.name: Detective's Badge

abilities.name: Protect and Serve
abilities.text: {Exert} — Chosen character gains Resist +1 and the Detective classification until the start of your next turn. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

data.flavor_text:
"It's not just a badge. It's who we are. There's no greater honor."
—Detective Judy Hopps

data.name: Ink Amplifier

abilities.name: Energy Capture
abilities.text: Whenever an opponent draws a card during their turn, if it's the second card they've drawn this turn, you may put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

data.flavor_text:
With a crackle of energy, the strange device lit up when
the glimmers entered the study.

data.name: Fairy Godmother's Wand

abilities.name: Only Till Midnight
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever you put a card into your inkwell, chosen Princess character of yours gains Ward until the start of your next turn. (Opponents can't choose them except to challenge.)

data.flavor_text: Sometimes a glimpse is all you need.

abilities.text: When you play this item, draw a card.

abilities.text: {Exert} — Chosen character gains Alert this turn. (They can challenge as if they had Evasive.)

data.name: Donald Duck

abilities.name: Raise a Ruckus
abilities.text: When you play this character, chosen Detective character gains Challenger +2 this turn. (They get +2 {Strength} while challenging.)

data.flavor_text:
"Let's show those rotten ghosts who's in charge!
You go first."

abilities.name: Dusk to Dawn
abilities.text: At the end of each player's turn, if they have more than 2 cards in their hand, they choose and discard cards until they have 2. If they have fewer than 2 cards in their hand, they draw until they have 2.

abilities.name: Stone by Day
abilities.text: If you have 3 or more cards in your hand, this character can't ready.

keywords.name: Shift 5 {Ink}
keywords.text: (You may pay 5 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named The Headless Horseman.)

abilities.name: Witching Hour
abilities.text: When you play this character, each player draws 3 cards, then discards 3 cards at random. Choose an opposing character and deal 2 damage to them for each action card discarded this way.

data.name: Clawhauser

keywords.name: Challenger +2
keywords.text: (While challenging, this character gets +2 {Strength}.)

data.flavor_text:
It was only a crumb, but Clawhauser knew it was a
small piece of a larger mystery.

data.name: Francine

keywords.name: Resist +1
keywords.text: (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 1.)

data.flavor_text:
Francine stared at the torn page, trying to take
her mind off Higgins and his pursuit of the littering
mastermind. Was he ready for the danger of
undercover work?

data.name: Inspector Tezuka

keywords.name: Bodyguard
keywords.text: (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

data.flavor_text:
"Stand back. I'll handle this."
—Inspector Tezuka

data.name: Nick Wilde
data.flavor_text:
"Okay, Nick, it's time to use those superior sleuthing
skills to find a way out of this. Wait, why am I talking to
myself?"

data.name: Basil

abilities.name: Hold Your Ground
abilities.text: Whenever you play another Detective character, this character gains Resist +1 until the start of your next turn. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

data.flavor_text: "It's time to make a stand!"

data.flavor_text:
It's hard to catch a ghost without going somewhere
spooky.

data.flavor_text:
"You may have bested me before, McDuck, but
not this time!"

keywords.name: Alert

data.name: David Xanatos

abilities.name: Minor Inconvenience

data.flavor_text:
"A plan only fails when you don't learn from it. And my
plans never fail."
—David Xanatos

abilities.name: My Jurisdiction
abilities.text: During your turn, this character can't be dealt damage.

abilities.name: Deputize
abilities.text: Your other characters gain the Detective classification.

abilities.name: Two For One

data.flavor_text:

"Yeah, lost in!"

data.name: Mayor Winddancer
data.flavor_text:
It's the role of a lifetime, and it'll take every bit
of his considerable charm and fabulous mane to
get it right.

keywords.name: Bodyguard

data.flavor_text: If you hear hoofbeats in the dark, don't look back.

data.name: But I'm Much Faster
rules: (A character with cost 1 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Chosen character gains Alert and Challenger +2 this turn. (They can challenge as if they had Evasive. They get +2 {Strength} while challenging.)

data.name: Putting It All Together
rules: Chosen opposing character can't challenge during their next turn. Draw a card.
data.flavor_text:
"Okay, so the ghostly glimmers were first seen here,
and the trail of torn lorebook pages started in this part
of the Illuminary..."
—Judy Hopps

data.name: He Hurled His Thunderbolt
rules: (A character with cost 4 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Deal 4 damage to chosen character. Your Deity characters gain Challenger +2 this turn. (They get +2 {Strength} while challenging.)

data.name: The Game's Afoot!
rules: Move up to 2 of your characters to the same location for free. That location gains Resist +2 until the start of your next turn. (Damage dealt to it is reduced by 2.)
data.flavor_text:
"We've not a moment to lose!"
—Basil

data.name: The Robot Queen

abilities.name: Major Malfunction
abilities.text: Whenever you play a character, you may pay 1 {Ink} and banish this item to deal 2 damage to chosen character.

data.flavor_text:
"To our beloved Queen this gift we send,
As her 60-year reign comes to an end."
—Note delivered with the robot queen

abilities.text: When you play this character, exert all opposing characters. Then, each player with fewer than 3 cards in their hand draws until they have 3.

abilities.name: Stone by Day
abilities.text: If you have 3 or more cards in your hand, this character can't ready.

data.name: Can't Hold it Back Anymore
rules: Exert chosen opposing character. Move all damage counters from all other characters to that character.

abilities.name: Work Smarter
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, if an opponent has more cards in their inkwell than you, you may put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

abilities.name: Roll with It
abilities.text: When you play this character, choose one: • Each player draws a card. • Each player chooses and discards a card.

data.name: Malicious, Mean, and Scary
rules: Put 1 damage counter on each opposing character.

abilities.name: Leaves No Trace
abilities.text: When you play this character, banish chosen opposing character with 2 {Strength} or less.

abilities.name: Gathering Strength
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever an opposing character is banished, each of your characters gets +1 {Strength} this turn.

abilities.name: Expedient Schemes
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, if you've put a card under her this turn, you may play an action with cost 5 or less from your discard for free, then put that action card on the bottom of your deck instead of into your discard.

data.name: Next Stop, Olympus
rules: Ready chosen character. They can't quest for the rest of this turn. The next time they challenge a character this turn, gain 1 lore.
If you have a character with 5 {Strength} or more in play, you pay 2 {Ink} less to play this action.

abilities.name: Lateral Thinking
abilities.text: During your turn, your Detective characters gain Alert and Resist +2.

abilities.name: Whatever You Wish For
abilities.text: At the end of your turn, if you played a Princess character this turn, you may put a card from your hand into your inkwell facedown to draw a card.

data.name: Spooky Sight
rules: Put all characters with cost 3 or less into their players' inkwells facedown and exerted.

abilities.name: Dusk to Dawn
abilities.text: At the end of each player's turn, if they have more than 2 cards in their hand, they choose and discard cards until they have 2. If they have fewer than 2 cards in their hand, they draw until they have 2.

abilities.name: Stone by Day
abilities.text: If you have 3 or more cards in your hand, this character can't ready.

abilities.name: Case Closed
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever one of your Detective characters banishes another character in a challenge, draw a card.

abilities.name: Mighty Hit
abilities.text: When you play this item, banish chosen opposing Deity character.

abilities.name: Hand-to-hand
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever one of your characters banishes another character in a challenge, gain 1 lore.

abilities.name: Command Performance
abilities.text: Once during your turn, whenever you play a song, if there's a card under this character, you may draw a card.

abilities.name: What D'Ya Say?
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may choose an opposing character. If you do, draw 2 cards unless that character's player puts that card on the bottom of their deck.
